content.content:
1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.util.Log
     4→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     5→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
     6→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
     7→import kotlinx.coroutines.withTimeout
     8→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
     9→import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
    10→import okhttp3.Request
    11→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    12→import org.json.JSONObject
    13→import java.io.IOException
    14→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    15→
    16→/**
    17→ * 视频下载服务 - 使用在线 API 解析视频
    18→ * 支持多平台：B站、抖音、YouTube、TikTok 等
    19→ *
    20→ * 改进点：
    21→ * - 参考 Electron 版本的平台检测和视频提取逻辑
    22→ * - 改进 B站、抖音的解析逻辑，支持多种备用 API
    23→ * - 添加 YouTube 支持（使用 yt-dlp API 或备用方案）
    24→ * - 改进错误处理和重试机制
    25→ * - 添加详细的日志输出
    26→ * - 支持Cookie认证（解决403问题）
    27→ */
    28→class VideoDownloadService(
    29→    private val bilibiliCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    30→    private val youtubeCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    31→    private val douyinCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null,
    32→    private val tiktokCookieProvider: (() -> String?)? = null
    33→) {
    34→
    35→    companion object {
    36→        private const val TAG = "VideoDownloadService"
    37→        private const val DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 30_000L
    38→        private const val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    39→        private const val RETRY_DELAY_MS = 1000L
    40→    }
    41→
    42→    /**
    43→     * 获取平台对应的Cookie
    44→     */
    45→    private fun getCookieForPlatform(url: String): String? {
    46→        return when {
    47→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") -> bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()
    48→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") -> youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()
    49→            url.contains("douyin.com") || url.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()
    50→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()
    51→            else -> null
    52→        }
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    /**
    56→     * 检查指定URL是否需要Cookie认证
    57→     */
    58→    fun isCookieRequired(url: String): Boolean {
    59→        return when {
    60→            url.contains("bilibili.com") || url.contains("b23.tv") -> bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    61→            url.contains("youtube.com") || url.contains("youtu.be") -> youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    62→            url.contains("douyin.com") || url.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    63→            url.contains("tiktok.com") -> tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    64→            else -> false
    65→        }
    66→    }
    67→
    68→    /**
    69→     * 检查是否已配置B站Cookie
    70→     */
    71→    fun hasBilibiliCookie(): Boolean {
    72→        return bilibiliCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    73→    }
    74→
    75→    /**
    76→     * 检查是否已配置YouTube Cookie
    77→     */
    78→    fun hasYouTubeCookie(): Boolean {
    79→        return youtubeCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    80→    }
    81→
    82→    /**
    83→     * 检查是否已配置抖音 Cookie
    84→     */
    85→    fun hasDouyinCookie(): Boolean {
    86→        return douyinCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    87→    }
    88→
    89→    /**
    90→     * 检查是否已配置TikTok Cookie
    91→     */
    92→    fun hasTiktokCookie(): Boolean {
    93→        return tiktokCookieProvider?.invoke()?.isNotBlank() == true
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    97→        .connectTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    98→        .readTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    99→        .followRedirects(true)
   100→        .build()
   101→
   102→    /**
   103→     * 平台检测 - 参考 Electron 版本的 detectPlatform 函数
   104→     * 支持更多平台和短链接
   105→     */
   106→    fun detectPlatform(url: String): VideoPlatform {
   107→        val lowerUrl = url.lowercase()
   108→        return when {
   109→            // YouTube - 支持主域名和短链接
   110→            lowerUrl.contains("youtube.com") || lowerUrl.contains("youtu.be") -> VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   111→            // Bilibili - 支持主域名和 b23.tv 短链接
   112→            lowerUrl.contains("bilibili.com") || lowerUrl.contains("b23.tv") -> VideoPlatform.BILIBILI
   113→            // 抖音 - 支持多种域名
   114→            lowerUrl.contains("douyin.com") || lowerUrl.contains("iesdouyin.com") -> VideoPlatform.DOUYIN
   115→            // TikTok
   116→            lowerUrl.contains("tiktok.com") -> VideoPlatform.TIKTOK
   117→            // 微博
   118→            lowerUrl.contains("weibo.com") -> VideoPlatform.WEIBO
   119→            // 小红书
   120→            lowerUrl.contains("xiaohongshu.com") || lowerUrl.contains("xhslink.com") -> VideoPlatform.XIAOHONGSHU
   121→            // 直接视频链接
   122→            lowerUrl.contains(".mp4") || lowerUrl.contains(".m3u8") || lowerUrl.contains(".mpd") -> VideoPlatform.DIRECT
   123→            // 未知平台
   124→            else -> VideoPlatform.UNKNOWN
   125→        }
   126→    }
   127→
   128→    /**
   129→     * 获取视频下载链接 - 主入口函数
   130→     * 参考 Electron 版本的 extract-info IPC 处理
   131→     */
   132→    suspend fun getVideoInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   133→        withTimeout(DEFAULT_TIMEOUT) {
   134→            try {
   135→                val cleanUrl = cleanUrl(url)
   136→                Log.d(TAG, "Processing URL: $cleanUrl")
   137→
   138→                val platform = detectPlatform(cleanUrl)
   139→                Log.d(TAG, "Detected platform: $platform")
   140→
   141→                when (platform) {
   142→                    VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE -> fetchYoutubeInfo(cleanUrl)
   143→                    VideoPlatform.BILIBILI -> fetchBilibiliInfo(cleanUrl)
   144→                    VideoPlatform.DOUYIN -> fetchDouyinInfo(cleanUrl)
   145→                    VideoPlatform.TIKTOK -> fetchTiktokInfo(cleanUrl)
   146→                    VideoPlatform.DIRECT -> Result.success(
   147→                        VideoDownloadInfo(
   148→                            title = "直接视频链接",
   149→                            downloadUrl = cleanUrl,
   150→                            cover = null,
   151→                            duration = 0L,
   152→                            author = null,
   153→                            platform = VideoPlatform.DIRECT
   154→                        )
   155→                    )
   156→                    else -> Result.failure(
   157→                        Exception(
   158→                            "❌ 不支持的平台\n\n当前链接: $cleanUrl\n\n支持的平台:\n• YouTube (youtube.com, youtu.be)\n• B站 (bilibili.com, b23.tv)\n• 抖音 (douyin.com)\n• TikTok (tiktok.com)\n\n建议: 请使用「导入本地视频」功能"
   159→                        )
   160→                    )
   161→                }
   162→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   163→                Log.e(TAG, "Error fetching video info", e)
   164→                Result.failure(e)
   165→            }
   166→        }
   167→    }
   168→
   169→    /**
   170→     * 清理 URL - 移除多余空格和无效字符
   171→     * 参考 Electron 版本的 cleanUrl 函数
   172→     */
   173→    private fun cleanUrl(url: String): String {
   174→        val trimmed = url.trim()
   175→        // 提取第一个有效的 HTTP/HTTPS 链接
   176→        val match = Regex("(https?://[^\\s\"'<>]+)").find(trimmed)
   177→        return match?.value ?: trimmed
   178→    }
   179→
   180→    /**
   181→     * 获取 YouTube 视频信息 - 改进版，使用 InnerTube API
   182→     * 基于 GitHub 研究：
   183→     * - ViMusic: https://github.com/vfsfitvnm/ViMusic (InnerTube 实现)
   184→     * - NewPipeExtractor: https://github.com/TeamNewPipe/NewPipeExtractor
   185→     */
   186→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   187→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching YouTube info for: $url")
   188→
   189→        // 策略1: 尝试 InnerTube API
   190→        val innertubeResult = fetchYouTubeInnerTubeAPI(url)
   191→        if (innertubeResult.isSuccess) {
   192→            Log.d(TAG, "InnerTube API success")
   193→            return innertubeResult
   194→        }
   195→        Log.w(TAG, "InnerTube API failed: ${innertubeResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   196→
   197→        // 策略2: 尝试第三方API（备用）
   198→        return fetchYouTubeThirdPartyAPI(url)
   199→    }
   200→
   201→    /**
   202→     * 使用 YouTube InnerTube API 解析
   203→     * InnerTube 是 YouTube 的内部 RESTful API
   204→     */
   205→    private suspend fun fetchYouTubeInnerTubeAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   206→        try {
   207→            val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   208→            if (videoId == null) {
   209→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取视频ID"))
   210→            }
   211→            Log.d(TAG, "YouTube video ID: $videoId")
   212→
   213→            // InnerTube API 请求
   214→            val requestBody = JSONObject().apply {
   215→                put("context", JSONObject().apply {
   216→                    put("client", JSONObject().apply {
   217→                        put("clientName", "ANDROID")
   218→                        put("clientVersion", "19.29.37")
   219→                    })
   220→                })
   221→                put("videoId", videoId)
   222→            }.toString()
   223→
   224→            val request = Request.Builder()
   225→                .url("https://www.youtube.com/youtubei/v1/player?key=AIzaSyAO_FJ2SlqU8Q4STEHLGCilw_Y9_11qcW8")
   226→                .header("Content-Type", "application/json")
   227→                .header("User-Agent", "com.google.android.youtube/19.29.37")
   228→                .post(requestBody.toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
   229→                .build()
   230→
   231→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   232→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   233→            val json = JSONObject(body)
   234→
   235→            val videoDetails = json.optJSONObject("videoDetails")
   236→            val title = videoDetails?.optString("title") ?: "YouTube视频"
   237→            val author = videoDetails?.optString("author") ?: ""
   238→            val lengthSeconds = videoDetails?.optLong("lengthSeconds") ?: 0L
   239→
   240→            val streamingData = json.optJSONObject("streamingData")
   241→            val formats = streamingData?.optJSONArray("formats")
   242→
   243→            if (formats != null && formats.length() > 0) {
   244→                val format = formats.getJSONObject(0)
   245→                val videoUrl = format.optString("url")
   246→                val thumbnails = videoDetails?.optJSONObject("thumbnail")?.optJSONArray("thumbnails")
   247→                val cover = thumbnails?.optJSONObject(0)?.optString("url") ?: ""
   248→
   249→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   250→                    title = title,
   251→                    downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   252→                    cover = cover,
   253→                    duration = lengthSeconds,
   254→                    author = author,
   255→                    platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   256→                ))
   257→            }
   258→
   259→            Result.failure(Exception("无法获取视频流"))
   260→
   261→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   262→            Log.e(TAG, "InnerTube API error", e)
   263→            Result.failure(e)
   264→        }
   265→    }
   266→
   267→    /**
   268→     * 使用第三方API解析（备用方案）
   269→     */
   270→    private suspend fun fetchYouTubeThirdPartyAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   271→        // 尝试多个第三方API
   272→        val apis = listOf(
   273→            YoutubeApiConfig("https://yt.lemnoslife.com/videosPart", "lemnoslife"),
   274→            YoutubeApiConfig("https://noembed.com/embed?url=$url", "noembed")
   275→        )
   276→
   277→        for (api in apis) {
   278→            try {
   279→                Log.d(TAG, "Trying YouTube API: ${api.name}")
   280→                val result = fetchYoutubeInfoWithApi(url, api)
   281→                if (result.isSuccess) {
   282→                    return result
   283→                }
   284→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   285→                Log.w(TAG, "YouTube API ${api.name} failed: ${e.message}")
   286→            }
   287→        }
   288→
   289→        return Result.failure(
   290→            Exception("❌ YouTube 解析失败\n\n建议：请使用「导入本地视频」功能或在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 下载")
   291→        )
   292→    }
   293→
   294→    /**
   295→     * 使用指定 API 获取 YouTube 视频信息
   296→     */
   297→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeInfoWithApi(
   298→        url: String,
   299→        api: YoutubeApiConfig
   300→    ): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   301→        try {
   302→            when (api.name) {
   303→                "lemnoslife" -> {
   304→                    // 使用 Lemnoslife API
   305→                    val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   306→                        ?: return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取 YouTube 视频 ID"))
   307→
   308→                    val request = Request.Builder()
   309→                        .url("${api.endpoint}?id=$videoId")
   310→                        .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   311→                        .build()
   312→
   313→                    val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   314→                    val responseBody = response.body?.string()
   315→                        ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   316→
   317→                    Log.d(TAG, "Lemnoslife API response: ${responseBody.take(200)}")
   318→
   319→                    val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   320→                    if (!json.has("items") || json.getJSONArray("items").length() == 0) {
   321→                        return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("视频不存在或不可用"))
   322→                    }
   323→
   324→                    val items = json.getJSONArray("items")
   325→                    val video = items.getJSONObject(0)
   326→
   327→                    // 注意：这个 API 主要提供元数据，不提供下载链接
   328→                    // 实际下载需要使用其他方法
   329→                    Result.success(
   330→                        VideoDownloadInfo(
   331→                            title = video.optString("title", "YouTube 视频"),
   332→                            downloadUrl = url, // 返回原 URL，需要特殊处理
   333→                            cover = video.optJSONArray("thumbnails")
   334→                                ?.optJSONObject(0)
   335→                                ?.optString("url"),
   336→                            duration = video.optLong("durationSeconds", 0L),
   337→                            author = video.optJSONArray("channel")
   338→                                ?.optJSONObject(0)
   339→                                ?.optString("name"),
   340→                            platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   341→                        )
   342→                    )
   343→                }
   344→                "noembed" -> {
   345→                    // 使用 NoEmbed API（主要用于获取元数据）
   346→                    val request = Request.Builder()
   347→                        .url(api.endpoint)
   348→                        .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   349→                        .build()
   350→
   351→                    val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   352→                    val responseBody = response.body?.string()
   353→                        ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   354→
   355→                    Log.d(TAG, "NoEmbed API response: ${responseBody.take(200)}")
   356→
   357→                    val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   358→                    val title = json.optString("title", "YouTube 视频")
   359→                    val author = json.optString("author_name")
   360→
   361→                    Result.success(
   362→                        VideoDownloadInfo(
   363→                            title = title,
   364→                            downloadUrl = url, // NoEmbed 不提供下载链接
   365→                            cover = json.optString("thumbnail_url"),
   366→                            duration = 0L,
   367→                            author = author,
   368→                            platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE
   369→                        )
   370→                    )
   371→                }
   372→                else -> Result.failure(Exception("未知 API"))
   373→            }
   374→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   375→            Log.e(TAG, "Error fetching YouTube info with ${api.name}", e)
   376→            Result.failure(e)
   377→        }
   378→    }
   379→
   380→    /**
   381→     * 提取 B站 BV 号
   382→     * 支持 BV 号和 b23.tv 短链接
   383→     */
   384→    private fun extractBVID(url: String): String? {
   385→        val bvPattern = Regex("(BV[a-zA-Z0-9]{10})")
   386→        val match = bvPattern.find(url)
   387→        return match?.groupValues?.get(1)
   388→    }
   389→
   390→    /**
   391→     * 提取 YouTube 视频 ID
   392→     */
   393→    private fun extractYoutubeVideoId(url: String): String? {
   394→        // 支持 youtube.com/watch?v= 和 youtu.be/ 格式
   395→        val patterns = listOf(
   396→            Regex("(?:youtube\\.com/watch\\?v=|youtu\\.be/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   397→            Regex("youtube\\.com/embed/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")
   398→        )
   399→
   400→        for (pattern in patterns) {
   401→            val match = pattern.find(url)
   402→            if (match != null) {
   403→                return match.groupValues[1]
   404→            }
   405→        }
   406→        return null
   407→    }
   408→
   409→    /**
   410→     * 获取 B站视频信息 - 改进版，优先使用官方API
   411→     * 基于 GitHub 研究：bilibili-api Kotlin 库实现
   412→     *
   413→     * 策略：
   414→     * 1. 优先使用 B站官方 API
   415→     * 2. 官方API失败后，尝试第三方API作为备用
   416→     */
   417→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   418→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching Bilibili info for: $url")
   419→
   420→        // 策略1: 尝试官方API
   421→        val officialResult = fetchBilibiliOfficialAPI(url)
   422→        if (officialResult.isSuccess) {
   423→            Log.d(TAG, "Official API success")
   424→            return officialResult
   425→        }
   426→        Log.w(TAG, "Official API failed: ${officialResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   427→
   428→        // 策略2: 尝试第三方API（备用）
   429→        return fetchBilibiliThirdPartyAPI(url)
   430→    }
   431→
   432→    /**
   433→     * 使用 B站官方 API 解析
   434→     * 参考 bilibili-api (Kotlin): https://github.com/czp3009/bilibili-api
   435→     *
   436→     * API 端点：
   437→     * - 视频信息: https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid={bvid}
   438→     * - 播放地址: https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?bvid={bvid}&cid={cid}
   439→     */
   440→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliOfficialAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   441→        try {
   442→            // 1. 提取 BV 号
   443→            val bvid = extractBVID(url)
   444→            if (bvid == null) {
   445→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取BV号"))
   446→            }
   447→            Log.d(TAG, "BV ID: $bvid")
   448→
   449→            // 获取Cookie（如果有配置）
   450→            val cookie = getCookieForPlatform(url)
   451→            if (cookie != null) {
   452→                Log.d(TAG, "Using configured cookies for Bilibili API")
   453→            }
   454→
   455→            // 2. 获取视频信息（获取 cid）
   456→            val infoUrl = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid=$bvid"
   457→            val infoRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   458→                .url(infoUrl)
   459→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   460→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   461→
   462→            // 添加Cookie
   463→            if (cookie != null) {
   464→                infoRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   465→            }
   466→
   467→            val infoRequest = infoRequestBuilder.build()
   468→
   469→            val infoResponse = client.newCall(infoRequest).execute()
   470→            val infoBody = infoResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   471→            val infoJson = JSONObject(infoBody)
   472→
   473→            if (infoJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   474→                val errorMsg = infoJson.optString("message")
   475→                // 检查是否是需要Cookie的错误
   476→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   477→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   478→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   479→                    )
   480→                }
   481→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API错误: $errorMsg"))
   482→            }
   483→
   484→            val data = infoJson.getJSONObject("data")
   485→            val cid = data.optLong("cid")
   486→            val title = data.optString("title")
   487→            val cover = data.optString("pic").replace("\\/\\\\/", "/")
   488→            val duration = data.optInt("duration")
   489→            val author = data.optJSONObject("owner")?.optString("name") ?: "未知UP主"
   490→
   491→            Log.d(TAG, "Video info: $title, cid=$cid")
   492→
   493→            // 3. 获取播放URL - 优先使用DASH格式（支持ffmpeg合并音视频）
   494→            val playUrl = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?bvid=$bvid&cid=$cid&qn=80&fnval=16&fnver=0&fourk=1"
   495→            val playRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   496→                .url(playUrl)
   497→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   498→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   499→
   500→            if (cookie != null) {
   501→                playRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   502→            }
   503→
   504→            val playRequest = playRequestBuilder.build()
   505→            val playResponse = client.newCall(playRequest).execute()
   506→            val playBody = playResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   507→            val playJson = JSONObject(playBody)
   508→
   509→            if (playJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   510→                val errorMsg = playJson.optString("message")
   511→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   512→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   513→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   514→                    )
   515→                }
   516→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("获取播放URL失败: $errorMsg"))
   517→            }
   518→
   519→            val playData = playJson.getJSONObject("data")
   520→            val dash = playData.optJSONObject("dash")
   521→            val durl = playData.optJSONArray("durl")
   522→
   523→            var videoUrl: String? = null
   524→            var audioUrl: String? = null
   525→
   526→            if (durl != null && durl.length() > 0) {
   527→                // MP4格式（包含音视频）
   528→                videoUrl = durl.getJSONObject(0).optString("url")
   529→            } else if (dash != null) {
   530→                // DASH格式 - 需要分别下载音频和视频
   531→                val dashVideo = dash.optJSONArray("video")
   532→                val dashAudio = dash.optJSONArray("audio")
   533→
   534→                if (dashVideo != null && dashVideo.length() > 0) {
   535→                    videoUrl = dashVideo.getJSONObject(0).optString("baseUrl")
   536→                    // 尝试选择最佳音频质量
   537→                    if (dashAudio != null && dashAudio.length() > 0) {
   538→                        audioUrl = dashAudio.getJSONObject(0).optString("baseUrl")
   539→                    }
   540→                    Log.d(TAG, "DASH format detected: video and audio will be merged")
   541→                }
   542→            }
   543→
   544→            if (videoUrl != null) {
   545→                Log.d(TAG, "Got video URL from official API, cookies used: ${cookie != null}, hasAudio: ${audioUrl != null}")
   546→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   547→                    title = title,
   548→                    downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   549→                    cover = cover,
   550→                    duration = duration.toLong(),
   551→                    author = author,
   552→                    cookies = cookie,
   553→                    platform = VideoPlatform.BILIBILI,
   554→                    audioUrl = audioUrl
   555→                ))
   556→            }
   557→
   558→            Result.failure(Exception("无法获取播放地址"))
   559→
   560→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   561→            Log.e(TAG, "Official API error", e)
   562→            Result.failure(e)
   563→        }
   564→    }
   565→
   566→    /**
   567→     * 使用第三方API解析（备用方案）
   568→     */
   569→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliThirdPartyAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   570→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching Bilibili info for: $url")
   571→
   572→        // 尝试多个API（按优先级排序）
   573→        val apis = listOf(
   574→            // API 1: xboba (稳定)
   575→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.xboba.com/bilibili/video/download?url=$url", "xboba"),
   576→            // API 2: 805t (备用)
   577→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.805t.cn/bilibili/api?url=$url", "805t"),
   578→            // API 3: y1les (备用)
   579→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.y1les.cn/api/bilibili?url=$url", "y1les"),
   580→            // API 4: xingzhige (备用)
   581→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.xingzhige.com/API/BiliBili/downUrl?url=$url", "xingzhige"),
   582→            // API 5: jiuling (备用)
   583→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.jiuling.xyz/bili/video?url=$url", "jiuling"),
   584→            // API 6: iktota (新增)
   585→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.iktota.com/api/bilibili?url=$url", "iktota"),
   586→            // API 7: yange (新增)
   587→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.yange.eu.org/bilibili/api?url=$url", "yange"),
   588→            // API 8: injahou (新增)
   589→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.injahou.cn/bilibili/api?url=$url", "injahou"),
   590→            // API 9: mnium (新增)
   591→            BilibiliApiConfig("https://api.mnium.cn/bilibili/video?url=$url", "mnium")
   592→        )
   593→
   594→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {
   595→            try {
   596→                Log.d(TAG, "[${index + 1}/${apis.size}] Trying Bilibili API: ${api.name}")
   597→
   598→                val result = fetchBilibiliInfoWithApi(api)
   599→                if (result.isSuccess) {
   600→                    Log.d(TAG, "Successfully fetched info using: ${api.name}")
   601→                    return result
   602→                }
   603→
   604→                Log.w(TAG, "API ${api.name} failed: ${result.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   605→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   606→                Log.e(TAG, "API ${api.name} threw exception", e)
   607→            }
   608→        }
   609→
   610→        // 所有 API 都失败，返回详细错误信息
   611→        return Result.failure(
   612→            Exception(
   613→                "❌ B站解析失败\n\n已尝试 ${apis.size} 个 API 均不可用\n\n可能的原因：\n• API 服务维护中或限流\n• 视频有地区限制\n• 会员专享内容\n• 视频已删除\n• 网络连接问题\n\n建议：\n• 稍后重试\n• 使用「导入本地视频」功能\n• 在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 下载"
   614→            )
   615→        )
   616→    }
   617→
   618→    /**
   619→     * 使用指定 API 获取 B站视频信息
   620→     */
   621→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliInfoWithApi(api: BilibiliApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   622→        try {
   623→            val request = Request.Builder()
   624→                .url(api.endpoint)
   625→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   626→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   627→                .build()
   628→
   629→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   630→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   631→
   632→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
   633→
   634→            // 检查是否是HTML响应（API可能失效）
   635→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
   636→                Log.w(TAG, "[${api.name}] API returned HTML, may be invalid")
   637→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
   638→            }
   639→
   640→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   641→
   642→            // 尝试多种返回格式解析
   643→
   644→            // 格式1: {data: {url: "...", title: "..."}}
   645→            if (json.has("data")) {
   646→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
   647→                val videoUrl = data.optJSONArray("url")?.optString(0)
   648→                    ?: data.optString("url")
   649→                    ?: data.optString("video_url")
   650→                    ?: data.optString("playurl")
   651→                    ?: data.optString("download_url")
   652→
   653→                val title = data.optString("title")
   654→                    ?: data.optString("name")
   655→                    ?: "B站视频"
   656→
   657→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   658→                    Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Got video URL: $videoUrl")
   659→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   660→                        title = title,
   661→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   662→                        cover = data.optString("pic")
   663→                            ?: data.optString("cover")
   664→                            ?: data.optString("img"),
   665→                        duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L) / 1000,
   666→                        author = data.optString("author")
   667→                            ?: data.optString("uploader")
   668→                            ?: data.optString("owner")?.let { ownerJson ->
   669→                                try { JSONObject(ownerJson).optString("name") } catch(e: Exception) { null }
   670→                            }
   671→                    ))
   672→                }
   673→            }
   674→
   675→            // 格式2: {url: "...", title: "..."}
   676→            val directUrl = json.optString("url")
   677→                ?: json.optString("video_url")
   678→                ?: json.optString("playurl")
   679→                ?: json.optString("download_url")
   680→
   681→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   682→                val title = json.optString("title") ?: "B站视频"
   683→                Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Got direct URL: $directUrl")
   684→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   685→                    title = title,
   686→                    downloadUrl = directUrl,
   687→                    cover = json.optString("pic") ?: json.optString("cover"),
   688→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L) / 1000,
   689→                    author = json.optString("author")
   690→                ))
   691→            }
   692→
   693→            // 格式3: {code: 200, data: {url: "..."}} 或 {code: 200, url: "..."}
   694→            if (json.optInt("code") == 200 || json.optInt("code") == 1) {
   695→                val nestedData = json.optJSONObject("data")
   696→                val videoUrl = nestedData?.optString("url")
   697→                    ?: nestedData?.optString("video_url")
   698→                    ?: json.optString("url")
   699→                    ?: json.optString("video_url")
   700→
   701→                if (videoUrl?.startsWith("http") == true) {
   702→                    val title = nestedData?.optString("title")
   703→                        ?: json.optString("title")
   704→                        ?: "B站视频"
   705→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   706→                        title = title,
   707→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   708→                        cover = nestedData?.optString("pic") ?: json.optString("pic"),
   709→                        duration = nestedData?.optLong("duration", 0L)?.div(1000) ?: 0L
   710→                    ))
   711→                }
   712→            }
   713→
   714→            // 格式4: {msg: "...", code: ...} - 可能包含错误信息
   715→            val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message")
   716→            if (msg.isNotEmpty()) {
   717→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回: $msg"))
   718→            }
   719→
   720→            // 无法解析
   721→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法解析API响应格式"))
   722→
   723→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   724→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
   725→            Result.failure(e)
   726→        }
   727→    }
   728→
   729→    /**
   730→     * 获取抖音视频信息 - 改进版，支持多种 API 和重试机制
   731→     * 参考 Electron 版本的浏览器内核解析方式
   732→     * 改进：增加更多备用 API，改进解析逻辑
   733→     */
   734→    private suspend fun fetchDouyinInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   735→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching Douyin info for: $url")
   736→
   737→        // 尝试多个API（按优先级排序）- 基于GitHub研究添加更多备用
   738→        val apis = listOf(
   739→            // API 1: pearktrue (稳定)
   740→            DouyinApiConfig("https://api.pearktrue.com/api/v1/parse/douyin?url=$url", "pearktrue"),
   741→            // API 2: vdzx (备用)
   742→            DouyinApiConfig("https://api.vdzx.com/api/douyin?url=$url", "vdzx"),
   743→            // API 3: xboba (备用)
   744→            DouyinApiConfig("https://api.xboba.com/douyin/video/download?url=$url", "xboba"),
   745→            // API 4: 805t (新增)
   746→            DouyinApiConfig("https://api.805t.cn/douyin/api?url=$url", "805t"),
   747→            // API 5: y1les (新增)
   748→            DouyinApiConfig("https://api.y1les.cn/api/douyin?url=$url", "y1les"),
   749→            // API 6: iktota (新增)
   750→            DouyinApiConfig("https://api.iktota.com/api/douyin?url=$url", "iktota")
   751→        )
   752→
   753→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {
   754→            try {
   755→                Log.d(TAG, "[${index + 1}/${apis.size}] Trying Douyin API: ${api.name}")
   756→
   757→                val result = fetchDouyinInfoWithApi(api)
   758→                if (result.isSuccess) {
   759→                    Log.d(TAG, "Successfully fetched info using: ${api.name}")
   760→                    return result
   761→                }
   762→
   763→                Log.w(TAG, "API ${api.name} failed: ${result.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   764→
   765→                // 如果不是最后一个API，延迟后重试
   766→                if (index < apis.size - 1) {
   767→                    delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS)
   768→                }
   769→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   770→                Log.e(TAG, "API ${api.name} threw exception", e)
   771→                if (index < apis.size - 1) {
   772→                    delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS)
   773→                }
   774→            }
   775→        }
   776→
   777→        // 所有 API 都失败
   778→        return Result.failure(
   779→            Exception(
   780→                "❌ 抖音解析失败\n\n已尝试 ${apis.size} 个 API 均不可用\n\n可能的原因：\n• 视频是私密内容\n• 视频已删除\n• API 服务限流\n• 链接格式错误\n\n建议：\n• 确认视频链接有效\n• 使用「导入本地视频」功能"
   781→            )
   782→        )
   783→    }
   784→
   785→    /**
   786→     * 使用指定 API 获取抖音视频信息
   787→     */
   788→    private suspend fun fetchDouyinInfoWithApi(api: DouyinApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   789→        try {
   790→            val request = Request.Builder()
   791→                .url(api.endpoint)
   792→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   793→                .header("Referer", "https://www.douyin.com/")
   794→                .build()
   795→
   796→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   797→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   798→
   799→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
   800→
   801→            // 检查是否是HTML
   802→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
   803→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
   804→            }
   805→
   806→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   807→
   808→            // 检查响应状态码
   809→            val code = json.optInt("code")
   810→            if (code != 200 && code != 1 && code != 0) {
   811→                val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message") ?: "未知错误"
   812→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回错误($code): $msg"))
   813→            }
   814→
   815→            // 解析视频数据 - 支持多种格式
   816→            // 格式1: {code: 200, data: {video: [{play_addr: "..."}], desc: "..."}}
   817→            if (json.has("data")) {
   818→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
   819→
   820→                // 尝试获取视频 URL
   821→                val videoData = data.optJSONArray("video")?.optJSONObject(0)
   822→                    ?: data.optJSONArray("data")?.optJSONObject(0)
   823→                    ?: data
   824→
   825→                val videoUrl = videoData.optString("play_addr")
   826→                    ?: videoData.optString("play_addr_https")
   827→                    ?: videoData.optString("url")
   828→                    ?: videoData.optString("video_url")
   829→                    ?: videoData.optString("download_addr")
   830→
   831→                val title = data.optString("desc")
   832→                    ?: data.optString("title")
   833→                    ?: data.optString("text")
   834→                    ?: "抖音视频"
   835→
   836→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && (videoUrl.startsWith("http") || videoUrl.startsWith("//"))) {
   837→                    // 处理相对协议 URL
   838→                    val finalUrl = if (videoUrl.startsWith("//")) "https:$videoUrl" else videoUrl
   839→
   840→                    // 提取作者信息
   841→                    val author = data.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
   842→                        ?: data.optString("author")
   843→                        ?: data.optString("nickname")
   844→
   845→                    val cover = data.optString("cover")
   846→                        ?: data.optString("thumb")
   847→                        ?: data.optString("origin_cover")
   848→                        ?: data.optString("dynamic_cover")
   849→                        ?: videoData.optString("cover")
   850→
   851→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   852→                        title = title,
   853→                        downloadUrl = finalUrl,
   854→                        cover = cover,
   855→                        duration = videoData.optLong("duration", 0L),
   856→                        author = author
   857→                    ))
   858→                }
   859→            }
   860→
   861→            // 格式2: {url: "...", title: "...", author: "..."}
   862→            val directUrl = json.optString("url")
   863→                ?: json.optString("play_addr")
   864→                ?: json.optString("video_url")
   865→
   866→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http") || directUrl.startsWith("//")) {
   867→                val finalUrl = if (directUrl.startsWith("//")) "https:$directUrl" else directUrl
   868→                val title = json.optString("title")
   869→                    ?: json.optString("desc")
   870→                    ?: json.optString("text")
   871→                    ?: "抖音视频"
   872→
   873→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   874→                    title = title,
   875→                    downloadUrl = finalUrl,
   876→                    cover = json.optString("cover") ?: json.optString("thumb"),
   877→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L),
   878→                    author = json.optString("author") ?: json.optString("nickname")
   879→                ))
   880→            }
   881→
   882→            // 无法获取视频链接
   883→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
   884→
   885→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   886→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
   887→            Result.failure(e)
   888→        }
   889→    }
   890→
   891→    /**
   892→     * 获取 TikTok 视频信息 - 改进版
   893→     * TikTok 和抖音解析逻辑相似，尝试多个 API
   894→     */
   895→    private suspend fun fetchTiktokInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   896→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching TikTok info for: $url")
   897→
   898→        // TikTok 可以使用与抖音类似的 API
   899→        val apis = listOf(
   900→            // API 1: tikwm (专门用于 TikTok)
   901→            TiktokApiConfig("https://www.tikwm.com/api/?url=$url", "tikwm"),
   902→            // API 2: 通用 API
   903→            TiktokApiConfig("https://api.pearktrue.com/api/v1/parse/tiktok?url=$url", "pearktrue"),
   904→            // API 3: other API
   905→            TiktokApiConfig("https://api.xboba.com/tiktok/video/download?url=$url", "xboba")
   906→        )
   907→
   908→        for ((index, api) in apis.withIndex()) {
   909→            try {
   910→                Log.d(TAG, "[${index + 1}/${apis.size}] Trying TikTok API: ${api.name}")
   911→
   912→                val result = fetchTiktokInfoWithApi(api)
   913→                if (result.isSuccess) {
   914→                    Log.d(TAG, "Successfully fetched info using: ${api.name}")
   915→                    return result
   916→                }
   917→
   918→                Log.w(TAG, "API ${api.name} failed: ${result.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   919→
   920→                if (index < apis.size - 1) {
   921→                    delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS)
   922→                }
   923→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   924→                Log.e(TAG, "API ${api.name} threw exception", e)
   925→                if (index < apis.size - 1) {
   926→                    delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS)
   927→                }
   928→            }
   929→        }
   930→
   931→        return Result.failure(
   932→            Exception(
   933→                "❌ TikTok 解析失败\n\n已尝试 ${apis.size} 个 API 均不可用\n\n可能的原因：\n• 视频是私密内容\n• 视频已删除\n• 地区限制\n• API 服务限流\n\n建议：\n• 使用「导入本地视频」功能"
   934→            )
   935→        )
   936→    }
   937→
   938→    /**
   939→     * 使用指定 API 获取 TikTok 视频信息
   940→     */
   941→    private suspend fun fetchTiktokInfoWithApi(api: TiktokApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   942→        try {
   943→            val request = Request.Builder()
   944→                .url(api.endpoint)
   945→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   946→                .header("Referer", "https://www.tiktok.com/")
   947→                .build()
   948→
   949→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   950→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   951→
   952→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
   953→
   954→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
   955→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
   956→            }
   957→
   958→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   959→
   960→            // tikwm API 格式: {code: 0, data: {title: "...", play: "...", ...}}
   961→            if (api.name == "tikwm") {
   962→                if (json.optInt("code") == 0 && json.has("data")) {
   963→                    val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
   964→                    val videoUrl = data.optString("play")
   965→                        ?: data.optString("hdplay")
   966→                        ?: data.optString("wmplay")
   967→
   968→                    if (videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   969→                        return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   970→                            title = data.optString("title") ?: "TikTok 视频",
   971→                            downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   972→                            cover = data.optString("cover") ?: data.optString("origin_cover"),
   973→                            duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L),
   974→                            author = data.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
   975→                        ))
   976→                    }
   977→                }
   978→            }
   979→
   980→            // 其他 API 通用格式
   981→            val code = json.optInt("code")
   982→            if (code != 200 && code != 1 && code != 0) {
   983→                val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message") ?: "未知错误"
   984→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回错误($code): $msg"))
   985→            }
   986→
   987→            if (json.has("data")) {
   988→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
   989→                val videoData = data.optJSONArray("video")?.optJSONObject(0) ?: data
   990→
   991→                val videoUrl = videoData.optString("play_addr")
   992→                    ?: videoData.optString("url")
   993→                    ?: data.optString("video_url")
   994→
   995→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   996→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   997→                        title = data.optString("desc") ?: data.optString("title") ?: "TikTok 视频",
   998→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   999→                        cover = data.optString("cover") ?: data.optString("thumb"),
  1000→                        duration = videoData.optLong("duration", 0L),
  1001→                        author = data.optJSONObject("author")?.optString("nickname")
  1002→                    ))
  1003→                }
  1004→            }
  1005→
  1006→            // 直接格式
  1007→            val directUrl = json.optString("url") ?: json.optString("video_url")
  1008→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http")) {
  1009→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
  1010→                    title = json.optString("title") ?: "TikTok 视频",
  1011→                    downloadUrl = directUrl,
  1012→                    cover = json.optString("cover"),
  1013→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L)
  1014→                ))
  1015→            }
  1016→
  1017→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法从API响应中提取视频链接"))
  1018→
  1019→        } catch (e: Exception) {
  1020→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
  1021→            Result.failure(e)
  1022→        }
  1023→    }
  1024→
  1025→    /**
  1026→     * 获取标准 User-Agent
  1027→     * 参考 Electron 版本使用真实的浏览器 UA
  1028→     */
  1029→    private fun getUserAgent(): String {
  1030→        return "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 " +
  1031→               "(KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"
  1032→    }
  1033→
  1034→    // ==================== API 配置数据类 ====================
  1035→
  1036→    private data class YoutubeApiConfig(
  1037→        val endpoint: String,
  1038→        val name: String
  1039→    )
  1040→
  1041→    private data class BilibiliApiConfig(
  1042→        val endpoint: String,
  1043→        val name: String
  1044→    )
  1045→
  1046→    private data class DouyinApiConfig(
  1047→        val endpoint: String,
  1048→        val name: String
  1049→    )
  1050→
  1051→    private data class TiktokApiConfig(
  1052→        val endpoint: String,
  1053→        val name: String
  1054→    )
  1055→
  1056→    /**
  1057→     * 下载数据类
  1058→     */
  1059→    data class VideoDownloadInfo(
  1060→        val title: String,
  1061→        val downloadUrl: String,
  1062→        val cover: String? = null,
  1063→        val duration: Long = 0,
  1064→        val author: String? = null,
  1065→        val cookies: String? = null, // 下载时需要的Cookie
  1066→        val platform: VideoPlatform = VideoPlatform.UNKNOWN,
  1067→        val audioUrl: String? = null // DASH格式的音频流URL
  1068→    )
  1069→
  1070→    /**
  1071→     * 支持的平台
  1072→     */
  1073→    enum class VideoPlatform {
  1074→        BILIBILI, DOUYIN, TIKTOK, YOUTUBE, WEIBO, XIAOHONGSHU, DIRECT, UNKNOWN
  1075→    }
  1076→}
  1077→

content.text: 修改已完成。让我验证一下修改结果。

content.content:
180→    /**
   181→     * 获取 YouTube 视频信息 - 改进版，使用 InnerTube API
   182→     * 基于 GitHub 研究：
   183→     * - ViMusic: https://github.com/vfsfitvnm/ViMusic (InnerTube 实现)
   184→     * - NewPipeExtractor: https://github.com/TeamNewPipe/NewPipeExtractor
   185→     */
   186→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeInfo(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> {
   187→        Log.d(TAG, "Fetching YouTube info for: $url")
   188→
   189→        // 策略1: 尝试 NewPipeExtractor（推荐）
   190→        val newPipeResult = fetchYoutubeNewPipe(url)
   191→        if (newPipeResult.isSuccess) {
   192→            Log.d(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor success")
   193→            return newPipeResult
   194→        }
   195→        Log.w(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor failed: ${newPipeResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   196→
   197→        // 策略2: 尝试 InnerTube API（备用）
   198→        val innertubeResult = fetchYouTubeInnerTubeAPI(url)
   199→        if (innertubeResult.isSuccess) {
   200→            Log.d(TAG, "InnerTube API success")
   201→            return innertubeResult
   202→        }
   203→        Log.w(TAG, "InnerTube API failed: ${innertubeResult.exceptionOrNull()?.message}")
   204→
   205→        // 策略3: 尝试第三方API（最后备用）
   206→        return fetchYouTubeThirdPartyAPI(url)
   207→    }
   208→
   209→    /**
   210→     * 使用 NewPipeExtractor 解析 YouTube 视频
   211→     * 这是专门为 Android 设计的库，不依赖 YouTube API
   212→     */
   213→    private suspend fun fetchYoutubeNewPipe(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   214→        try {
   215→            val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   216→                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取 YouTube 视频 ID"))
   217→
   218→            Log.d(TAG, "Using NewPipeExtractor for YouTube: $videoId")
   219→
   220→            val streamInfo = org.schabi.newpipe.extractor.stream.StreamInfo.getInfo(
   221→                org.schabi.newpipe.extractor.NewPipe.getService(0),
   222→                url
   223→            )
   224→
   225→            // 获取最佳视频流
   226→            val videoStream = streamInfo.videoStreams
   227→                .filter { it.isVideo }
   228→                .maxByOrNull { it.height ?: 0 }
   229→
   230→            // 获取音频流
   231→            val audioStream = streamInfo.audioStreams
   232→                .filter { it.isAudio }
   233→                .maxByOrNull { it.averageBitrate ?: 0 }
   234→
   235→            if (videoStream != null) {
   236→                Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   237→                    title = streamInfo.name ?: "YouTube 视频",
   238→                    downloadUrl = videoStream.url ?: "",
   239→                    cover = streamInfo.thumbnails?.firstOrNull()?.url,
   240→                    duration = streamInfo.duration?.toLong() ?: 0L,
   241→                    author = streamInfo.uploaderName,
   242→                    platform = VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE,
   243→                    audioUrl = audioStream?.url
   244→                ))
   245→            } else {
   246→                Result.failure(Exception("无法获取视频流"))
   247→            }
   248→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   249→            Log.e(TAG, "NewPipeExtractor error", e)
   250→            Result.failure(e)
   251→        }
   252→    }
   253→
   254→    /**
   255→     * 使用 YouTube InnerTube API 解析
   256→     * InnerTube 是 YouTube 的内部 RESTful API
   257→     */
   258→    private suspend fun fetchYouTubeInnerTubeAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   259→        try {
   260→            val videoId = extractYoutubeVideoId(url)
   261→            if (videoId == null) {
   262→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取视频ID"))
   263→            }
   264→            Log.d(TAG, "YouTube video ID: $videoId")
   265→
   266→            // InnerTube API 请求
   267→            val requestBody = JSONObject().apply {
   268→                put("context", JSONObject().apply {
   269→                    put("client", JSONObject().apply {
   270→                        put("clientName", "ANDROID")
   271→                        put("clientVersion", "19.29.37")
   272→                    })
   273→                })
   274→                put("videoId", videoId)
   275→            }.toString()
   276→
   277→            val request = Request.Builder()
   278→                .url("https://www.youtube.com/youtubei/v1/player?key=AIzaSyAO_FJ2SlqU8Q4STEHLGCilw_Y9_11qcW8")
   279→                .header("Content-Type", "application/json")
   280→                .header("User-Agent", "com.google.android.youtube/19.29.37")
   281→                .post(requestBody.toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
   282→                .build()
   283→
   284→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   285→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   286→            val json = JSONObject(body)
   287→
   288→            val videoDetails = json.optJSONObject("videoDetails")
   289→            val title = videoDetails?.optString("title") ?: "YouTube视频"
   290→            val author = videoDetails?.optString("author") ?: ""
   291→            val lengthSeconds = videoDetails?.optLong("lengthSeconds") ?: 0L
   292→
   293→            val streamingData = json.optJSONObject("streamingData")
   294→            val formats = streamingData?.optJSONArray("formats")
   295→
   296→            if (formats != null && formats.length() > 0) {
   297→                val format = formats.getJSONObject(0)
   298→                val videoUrl = format.optString("url")
   299→                val thumbnails = videoDetails?.optJSONObject("thumbnail")?.optJSONArray("thumbnails")

content.text:
修改已成功完成。以下是修改总结：

## 修改完成

在文件 `D:/llapk/app/src/main/java/com/multilanglearner/data/network/VideoDownloadService.kt` 中完成了以下修改：

### 1. 新增 `fetchYoutubeNewPipe` 方法（第 209-252 行）

添加了使用 NewPipeExtractor 解析 YouTube 视频的私有方法，该方法：
- 使用 `org.schabi.newpipe.extractor.stream.StreamInfo` 获取视频信息
- 自动选择最佳视频流（按分辨率排序）
- 自动选择最佳音频流（按比特率排序）
- 返回包含视频标题、下载链接、封面、时长、作者和音频链接的 `VideoDownloadInfo`

### 2. 修改 `fetchYoutubeInfo` 方法（第 186-207 行）

更新了 YouTube 视频解析的策略顺序：
- **策略1**: 尝试 NewPipeExtractor（推荐）- 专为 Android 设计，不依赖 YouTube API
- **策略2**: 尝试 InnerTube API（备用）
- **策略3**: 尝试第三方 API（最后备用）

### 注意事项

使用此代码前，需要确保项目中已添加 NewPipeExtractor 依赖。在 `build.gradle` 中添加：

```gradle
implementation 'com.github.TeamNewPipe:NewPipeExtractor:v0.24.3'
```
